applyTo: "**"
---

Use highly scalable and maintainable coding standards throughout the codebase. Use robust error handling, clear and consistent naming conventions, and modular design principles to ensure code quality and readability. Use React Native, TypeScript, Expo and NativeWind best practices where applicable. Ensure all code is well-documented with comments explaining complex logic and decisions. Adhere to the project's linting and formatting rules to maintain a uniform code style.
Prioritize performance optimization and efficient resource management in all implementations. Regularly review and refactor code to eliminate redundancies and improve efficiency. Write unit tests for critical components to ensure reliability and facilitate future maintenance.
Follow accessibility best practices to ensure the application is usable by all users. Incorporate security best practices to protect user data and maintain application integrity. Regularly update dependencies to mitigate vulnerabilities and leverage improvements in the ecosystem.
Stay updated with the latest developments in React Native, TypeScript, Expo, and NativeWind to continuously enhance coding standards and practices.
